'''Drugons''' were fierce underwater predators found on many worlds, including [[Sulon/Legends|Sulon]] and [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]]. Despite their large bulk, drugons were surprisingly fast swimmers, and their powerful jaws could deliver a devastating bite.

Three drugons were known to have been kept by [[Kaerobani]] on [[Rathalay]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Dark Forces II]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''
